title: Discover files in Auto Loader efficiently using file events
body:
Auto Loader with file events is now GA. With this feature, Auto Loader can discover files with the efficiency of notifications while retaining the setup simplicity of directory listing. This is the recommended way to use Auto Loader (and particularly file notifications) with Unity Catalog. Learn more [here](https://docs.databricks.com/aws/en/ingestion/cloud-object-storage/auto-loader/file-events-explained).

To start using Auto Loader with file events, see the following:

* [(Prerequisite) Enable file events for an external location](/aws/en/connect/unity-catalog/cloud-storage/manage-external-locations#file-events)
* [File notification mode with and without file events enabled on external locations](/aws/en/ingestion/cloud-object-storage/auto-loader/file-notification-mode#compare)

ref_links.text: (Prerequisite) Enable file events for an external location
File notification mode with and without file events enabled on external locations
